##RRUFFID=R141089
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=(Ca,REE)_5_(SiO_4_,PO_4_)_3_F
##LOCALITY=In den Dellen, Laach lake volcano, Mendig, Eifel, Germany
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Ch. and H. Schäfer
##DESCRIPTION=Light pinkish, hexagonal prismatic crystals, associated with black prismatic augite and volcanic glass.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R141089
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.54 b: 9.54 c: 6.989 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 550.8 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
